name: Model Release Agreement
description: Legal permission from a model allowing a photographer/videographer to use their likeness in visuals.
content:
MODEL RELEASE AGREEMENT

This Agreement is made on {{formatDate agreement_date}} between {{photographer_name}} ("Photographer/Videographer") and {{model_name}} ("Model").

1. PARTIES

Photographer/Videographer: {{photographer_name}}
Address: {{photographer_address}}
Email: {{photographer_email}}

Model: {{model_name}}
Address: {{model_address}}
Phone: {{model_phone}}
Email: {{model_email}}

{{#if (eq is_minor 'Yes')}}

Guardian/Parent: {{guardian_name}}
Phone: {{guardian_phone}}

{{/if}}

2. SESSION INFORMATION

This release applies to visuals (the "Work") created on {{formatDate session_date}} at {{session_location}} regarding the project: {{project_name}}.

3. GRANT OF RIGHTS

The Model (and Guardian, if applicable) hereby grants the Photographer the irrevocable and unrestricted right to use and publish the Work for the following purposes:

{{usage_purposes}}

Across the following media/platforms:

{{media_channels}}
{{#if (eq was_paid 'Yes')}}

Compensation: The Model has received {{payment_amount}} as full and final payment for the rights granted herein.

{{else}}

Compensation: This release is granted without monetary compensation, for the mutual benefit of the parties (e.g., portfolio use).

{{/if}}

4. RELEASE & INDEMNITY

I hereby release and discharge the Photographer from any and all claims and demands arising out of or in connection with the use of the Work, including without limitation any and all claims for libel or invasion of privacy.

Date: {{formatDate agreement_date}}

Photographer: _________________________

Model: _________________________

{{#if (eq is_minor 'Yes')}}

Guardian: _________________________

{{/if}}
